translations.### 哪裡可做轉場動畫？\n\n: ### Where Can Transition Animations Be Done?
translations.### 自製下拉關閉頁面效果\n\n: ### Custom Pull-Down to Close Page Effect
translations.#### 可中斷、繼續的轉場動畫: UIViewPropertyAnimator: #### Interruptible and Resumable Transition Animation: UIViewPropertyAnimator
translations.#### 如何取消下拉關閉？關閉確認？\n\n: #### How to Disable Pull-Down to Dismiss? Dismiss Confirmation?
translations.#### 還是走正規的吧：\n\n: #### Let's stick to the standard way:
translations.***如果之前有把一些邏輯放在 viewWillAppear/viewWillD: ***If you previously placed some logic in viewWillAppear/viewWillDisappear/viewDidAppear/viewDidDisappear, be sure to carefully check and pay attention!** ⚠️*
translations.**Murmur…**\n其實我本來是想全都改用新的 `UIViewProper:
**Murmur…**  
Actually, I originally wanted to switch everything to the new `UIViewPropertyAnimator` and recommend everyone to use it, but I encountered a strange issue. When doing a full-page gesture pop animation, if the gesture is released and the animation resets, the navigation bar items at the top flicker with a fade in and out… I couldn’t find a solution. However, using `UIView.animate` does not have this problem. If I missed anything, feel free to let me know <( _ _ )>.
translations.**交互動畫：** 手勢觸發動畫，如 UIPanGestureRecognize: **Interactive Animation:** Animations triggered by gestures, such as UIPanGestureRecognizer
translations.**若需要參考優雅的程式碼封裝使用：**\n\n: **If you need to refer to elegant code encapsulation:**
translations.**非交互動畫：** 系統呼叫動畫，如 self.present()\n\n: **Non-interactive Animation:** System-triggered animations, such as self.present()
translations.*iOS ≥ 13，如果遇到 View 內容有 UITextView，在做下拉關: *iOS ≥ 13, if the View contains a UITextView, during the pull-down close animation, the text content in the UITextView will appear blank; this causes a flickering experience [(video example)](https://twitter.com/zhgchgli/status/1207851671553892352){:target="_blank"} …*
translations.*⚠️ **因 XCODE 11 之後版本打包的 iOS ≥ 13 APP 預設: *⚠️ **Since XCODE 11, iOS ≥ 13 apps use card style (UIModalPresentationAutomatic) by default for Present***
translations.*交互情況下 (後面講控制會細提)，會使用 `interruptibleAnim: *In interactive cases (detailed later in control), animations use the `interruptibleAnimator` method; non-interactive cases still use the `animateTransition` method.*
translations.*任何 `UIViewController` 都能實作 `transitioni: *Any `UIViewController` can implement `transitioningDelegate` to specify `Present/Dismiss` animations; `UITabBarViewController`, `UINavigationController`, `UITableViewController`, and others are all supported*
translations.*但因 `UIView.animate` 若無可執行動畫就不會 Call `co: *However, since `UIView.animate` will not call `completion` if no animation is performed, the aforementioned method may not be called; therefore, make sure the animation actually runs (e.g., y from 100 to 0).*
translations.*但這邊有個問題，就是在做 Present/Dismiss 動畫時當 `moda: *But here is an issue when doing Present/Dismiss animations with `modalPresentationStyle = .custom`;*
translations.*內容有點多，嫌麻煩的可以直接拉到底看範例，或直接下載 Github 專案回來研: *The content is a bit long; if you find it troublesome, you can scroll down to see the examples or directly download the GitHub project to study!*
translations.*參與動畫的 `ToView/FromView` ，若因 View 較為複雜或動: *If the `ToView/FromView` involved in the animation is complex or causes issues during the animation, you can use `snapshotView(afterScreenUpdates:)` to create a snapshot for the animation. First, take a snapshot and add it to the layer with `transitionContext.containerView.addSubview(snapShotView)`. Then hide the original `ToView/FromView (isHidden = true)`. After the animation ends, remove the `snapShotView` with `snapShotView.removeFromSuperview()` and restore the visibility of the original `ToView/FromView (isHidden = false)`.*
translations.*可以多加設置確保一下！*\n\n: *You can add more settings to ensure it!*
translations.*因為能繼續、中斷的特性；所以 `interruptibleAnimator`: *Because of the ability to continue and interrupt, `interruptibleAnimator` may be called repeatedly; therefore, we need to use a global variable to store and return it.*
translations.*官方建議從 `transitionContext.view` 拿 View 使: *The official recommendation is to get the view from `transitionContext.view` instead of using .view from `transitionContext.viewController`.*
translations.*有實作 interactionControllerFor … 這些方法，就算動: *If you implement methods like interactionControllerFor…, these methods will be called even for non-interactive animations (e.g., system-triggered transitions like self.present); what we need to control is the `wantsInteractiveStart` parameter inside (explained below).*
translations.*本篇一方面是自我紀錄，另一方面希望有幫助到跟我有一樣困惑的朋友。*\n\n: *This article is partly for self-recording and partly to help friends who share the same confusion as me.*
translations.*要退出重進 APP 才會恢復正。*\n\n: *You need to quit and reopen the app to restore it properly.*
translations.*這邊的解決方案是在做動畫時用 `snapshotView(afterScree: *The solution here is to use `snapshotView(afterScreenUpdates:)` to capture a snapshot instead of the original view layer during animation.*
translations.*還是需要從 viewController.view 拿值來用。*\n\n: *Still need to get values from viewController.view.*
translations.> ***If you previously placed some logic: > ***If you previously placed some logic in viewWillAppear/viewWillDisappear/viewDidAppear/viewDidDisappear, be sure to carefully check and pay attention!** ⚠️*

First, take a snapshot and add it to the layer with `transitionContext.containerView.addSubview(snapShotView)`. Then hide the original `ToView/FromView (isHidden = true)`. After the animation ends, remove the `snapShotView` with `snapShotView.removeFromSuperview()` and restore the visibility of the original `ToView/FromView (isHidden = false)`.*
translations.> *If you implement methods like interac: > *If you implement methods like interactionControllerFor…, these methods will be called even for non-interactive animations (e.g., system-triggered transitions like self.present); what we need to control is the `wantsInteractiveStart` parameter inside (explained below).*
translations.> *In interactive cases (detailed later: > *In interactive cases (explained later), animations use the `interruptibleAnimator` method; non-interactive cases still use the `animateTransition` method.*

translations.> `transitionContext.completeTransition(: > `transitionContext.completeTransition(!transitionContext.transitionWasCancelled)` *Must be called when the animation finishes, otherwise the **screen will freeze** ;*
translations.> `wantsInteractiveStart` ***must be set: > `wantsInteractiveStart` ***must be set appropriately**; setting `wantsInteractiveStart = false` during an interactive animation can also cause the screen to freeze;*
translations.UIViewController 下拉關閉/上拉出現/全頁右滑返回 效果全解\n: Complete Guide to UIViewController Pull-Down Dismissal / Pull-Up Presentation / Full-Page Right-Swipe Back Effects
translations.[**關於 sender.setTranslation(.zero, in:in: [**Additional notes on why sender.setTranslation(.zero, in:interactiveView) is needed<*](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/29558622/pan-gesture-why-need-settranslation-to-zero){:target="_blank"}
translations.[用UIPresentationController来写一个简洁漂亮的底部弹出控: [Using UIPresentationController to create a simple and elegant bottom popup control](https://juejin.im/post/5a9651d25188257a5911f666){:target="_blank"} (If you only need the Present animation effect, you can directly use this)
translations.[系统学习iOS动画之五：使用UIViewPropertyAnimator](h: [Systematic Learning of iOS Animations Part 5: Using UIViewPropertyAnimator](https://juejin.im/post/5c3aa7ff518825551e285b8d){:target="_blank"}
[Systematic Learning of iOS Animations Part 4: View Controller Transition Animations](https://juejin.im/post/5c24745b6fb9a049d5198ce5#18-%E5%AF%BC%E8%88%AA%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6%E5%99%A8%E8%BD%AC%E5%9C%BA){:target="_blank"}
translations.`UIAdaptivePresentationControllerDelegat: The `UIAdaptivePresentationControllerDelegate presentationControllerDidAttemptToDismiss` method is only called when **a dismissal is canceled by pulling down**.
translations.`UINavigationController` 大概是最不太需要會改動畫的，因: `UINavigationController` is probably the one that rarely needs custom animations, because the system's default swipe-left to push and swipe-right to pop animations are already the best. If you want to customize this part, it might be used to create seamless left-right `UIViewController` switching effects.
translations.`transitionContext.completeTransition(!t: `transitionContext.completeTransition(!transitionContext.transitionWasCancelled)` *Must be called when the animation completes, otherwise the **screen will freeze** ;*
translations.`wantsInteractiveStart` ***務必處於符合的狀態** ，: `wantsInteractiveStart` ***must be set appropriately**; setting `wantsInteractiveStart = false` during an interactive animation can also cause the screen to freeze;*
translations.ㄧ樣使用本篇的方式，我們在 `navigationController` POP: Using the same approach as in this article, we handle the navigationController POP ourselves; just add a full-screen right-swipe gesture with a custom right-swipe animation!
translations.一直以來都很好奇諸如 Facebook、Line、Spotify…等等常用的 A: I have always been curious about how popular apps like Facebook, Line, Spotify, and others implement effects such as "presented UIViewController can be dismissed by pulling down," "UIViewController fades in with an upward swipe," and "full-screen support for interactive right-swipe back gestures."
translations.一開始自己研究做法時找到 `UIPresentationController`: At first, when I was exploring on my own, I found the `UIPresentationController` API and, without digging deeper, used it along with `UIPanGestureRecognizer` in a very rough way to achieve the pull-down-to-close effect. I always felt something was off and that there must be a better approach.
translations.不知道是不會下關鍵字還是資料本身難找，一直找不到這類功能的實踐做法，找到的資料都: I’m not sure if it’s because I don’t know the right keywords or the information itself is hard to find, but I’ve been unable to locate practical implementations of this feature. The materials I found are vague and scattered, so I can only piece them together bit by bit.
translations.以上就能達到如圖的效果，這邊因教學展示不想弄的路太複雜，所以程式碼很醜，還有很多: The above achieves the effect shown in the image. Since this is a tutorial demonstration, the code is quite messy and there is plenty of room for optimization and integration.
translations.其他省略，只貼關鍵的動畫跟交互處理類別：\n\n: Other parts omitted, only key animation and interaction handling classes are shown:
translations.再來講核心要實作的 `UIPercentDrivenInteractiveTra: Next, let's talk about the core implementation of `UIPercentDrivenInteractiveTransition`.
translations.再講動畫實作、手勢控制前，先講一下何謂交互與非交互。\n\n: Before discussing animation implementation and gesture control, let's first explain what interactive and non-interactive mean.
translations.卡片樣式呈現頁面對系統來說就是 `Sheet` ，行為上跟 `FullScree: A card-style presented page is considered a `Sheet` by the system, which behaves differently from `FullScreen`.
translations.取消下拉關閉可指定 `UIViewController` 的變數 `isModa: To disable pull-down dismissal, you can either set the `UIViewController` variable `isModalInPresentation` to false or implement the `UIAdaptivePresentationControllerDelegate` method `presentationControllerShouldDismiss` and return `true`. Either approach works.
translations.另外也可以使用 **iOS ≥ 10** 新的動畫類別來實作動畫效果，\n看個人:
You can also use the new animation class introduced in **iOS ≥ 10** to implement animation effects.  
Choose based on your preference or the level of detail needed for the animation.  
Although the official recommendation is to use `UIViewPropertyAnimator` for interactive animations, **in most cases, whether interactive or not (gesture-controlled), `UIView.animate` is sufficient**.  
`UIViewPropertyAnimator` supports pausing and continuing animations, but I’m not sure where this is practically applied. Interested readers can refer to [this article](https://juejin.im/post/5c3aa7ff518825551e285b8d){:target="_blank"}.
translations.另外如果需要更細緻的控制，例如 ViewController 裡面有某個元件需要: If you need finer control, such as a specific component inside the ViewController changing along with the transition animation, you can use `transitionCoordinator` in `UIViewController` to coordinate. I didn't use this part; if interested, refer to [this article](https://kemchenj.github.io/2018-12-24/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.同前面 `ViewController` 代理動畫設計，交互處理的類也需要在代理: Similar to the previous `ViewController` delegate animation design, the interactive handler class also needs to inform the `ViewController` through the delegate.
translations.問題圖; + 按鈕是上一頁的\n\n: Problem image; + button is the previous page's
translations.因為我們要做全頁都可手勢返回，需要配合自訂 POP 動畫，所以需要自己實作一個返: Since we want full-page gesture back support, we need to implement a custom POP animation, so we must create our own back animation effect.
translations.因為這些效果內建都沒有，下拉關閉也直到 iOS ≥ 13 才有系統的卡片樣式支援: Because these effects are not built-in, the pull-down-to-close feature only has system card style support starting from iOS 13.
translations.在View上上拉漸入＋下拉關閉，就是在做類似 Spotify 的播放器轉場效果了: Pull up to fade in + pull down to close on the view is similar to the transition effect in Spotify's player!
translations.實際會依照不同的動畫效果建立個別的 Class，若覺得很檔案雜，可參考文末包好的: In practice, create separate classes for different animation effects. If you find the files too scattered, you can refer to the bundled solution at the end of the article; or group the related (Present + Dismiss) animations together.
translations.我們可以在 `UITabBarController` 設定 `delegate`: We can set the `delegate` of `UITabBarController` and implement the `animationControllerForTransitionFrom` method to apply custom transition effects when switching between `UITabBarController` tabs.
translations.我們需要依據不同的手勢操作效果，實作不同的 Class；若是同個連貫(Prese: We need to implement different classes based on different gesture interactions; if the operations are part of the same flow (Present + Dismiss), they can be combined together.
translations.我們需要實作 `UIViewControllerAnimatedTransiti: We need to implement the `UIViewControllerAnimatedTransitioning` protocol and perform animations on the window within it.
translations.所以保險起見還是用舊的方式吧！\n\n: So to be safe, let's stick with the old method!
translations.更好的使用者體驗應該要能在觸發下拉關閉時檢查有無輸入資料，有的話需要提示使用者是: A better user experience should check for any input data when triggering a pull-down to close. If there is input, the user should be prompted to confirm if they want to discard changes and leave.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.此篇很長，也花了我許久時間整理製作，感謝您的耐心閱讀。\n\n: This article is very long and took me quite some time to compile. Thank you for your patience in reading.
translations.沒錯！看起來就很 Private API，感覺審核會被拒；而且不確定 Swift: Exactly! It definitely looks like a Private API and might get rejected during review. Also, it's unclear if Swift can use it since it probably relies on Objective-C runtime features.
translations.理所當然，在 `Present/Dismiss` `UIViewControll: Naturally, when presenting or dismissing a `UIViewController`, you can specify the animation effect; otherwise, this article wouldn't exist XD. However, it's worth mentioning that if you only need a simple present animation without gesture control, you can directly use `UIPresentationController` for convenience and speed (see references at the end).
translations.當我們把這裡個 `Delegate` 設好、 `Class` 建好後就能做到我們:
Once we have set up the `Delegate` here and created the `Class`, we can achieve the desired functionality.  
Next, without further ado, let's jump straight to the complete example.
translations.直到最近接觸新專案拜讀 [大大的文章](https://imnotyourson: Until recently, when working on a new project, I read the [author's article](https://imnotyourson.com/draggable-view-controller-interactive-view-controller/){:target="_blank"} and broadened my perspective to discover other APIs that offer more elegant and flexible solutions.
translations.直接使用 `UIView.animate` 做動畫處理，此時的 `UIViewC: Using `UIView.animate` directly for animation, the `UIViewControllerAnimatedTransitioning` must implement `transitionDuration` to specify the animation duration and `animateTransition` to define the animation content.
translations.看完系統內建的，來看本篇重頭戲吧！如何自幹這些效果？\n\n: After reviewing the system's built-in features, let's get to the main part! How to create these effects yourself?
translations.系統預設是上滑出現下滑消失！自己客製的話可以加入淡入、圓角、出現位置控制…等效果: The system default is swipe up to present and swipe down to dismiss! When customizing, you can add fade-in, rounded corners, control the appearance position, and more.
translations.系統預設無動畫，上方展示圖的是淡入淡出切換特效。\n\n: The system default has no animation. The image above shows a crossfade transition effect.
translations.自製下拉的好處在能支援市面所有 iOS 版本、可控制蓋板百分比、控制觸發關閉位置: The advantage of custom pull-down is that it supports all iOS versions on the market, allows control over the overlay percentage, controls the trigger position for closing, and enables customized animation effects.
translations.要說哪裡要注意，大概就是 **在上拉漸入時，動畫要確保是使用「.curveLin: The main point to note is **when performing an upward slide-in animation, make sure to use the ".curveLinear" timing curve**; otherwise, the slide-up won't follow the finger properly. The drag distance and the displayed position won't be proportional.
translations.講完哪裡可以做，再來看怎麼做動畫效果。\n\n: After explaining where it can be done, let's now look at how to create the animation effects.
translations.這是一個 `HomeViewController` Present `HomeA: This is an example of `HomeViewController` presenting `HomeAddViewController` and `HomeAddViewController` dismissing.
translations.這邊就是前述所說的「交互」，實際就是手勢控制；本篇最重要的章節，因為我們的要做的: This is the "interactive" part mentioned earlier, which means gesture control in practice. This is the most important section of the article because what we need to achieve is the linkage between gesture operations and transition animations to realize the pull-down close and full-page back functions.
translations.這部分蘋果也幫我們想好了，只需實作 `UIAdaptivePresentatio: Apple has already taken care of this part for us; we just need to implement the methods in `UIAdaptivePresentationControllerDelegate`.
translations.這部分較為繁瑣，但原理一樣，這邊就不 PO 出來了，有興趣的朋友可參考 GitH: This part is more complex, but the principle is the same. It won't be posted here. Interested readers can refer to the GitHub example.
translations.首先先整理哪裡可以做視窗切換轉場動畫。\n\n: First, let's organize where window transition animations can be applied.
translations.首先講最新系統內建的效果\niOS ≥ 13 後 `UIViewControll:
First, let's talk about the built-in effect in the latest system  
In iOS ≥ 13, the default `modalPresentationStyle` of `UIViewController.present(_:animated:completion:)` is `UIModalPresentationAutomatic`, which presents the page in a card style. If you want to keep the previous full-screen presentation, you need to explicitly set it back to `UIModalPresentationFullScreen`.
translations.點右上方 + Present 頁面\n\n: Tap the + button at the top right to Present the page
